title: Frosted Friends
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/578/title.png)

**The "Frosted Friends" mod adds refrigerated items! It also allows you to make your own snowman by hand, you just need a snow layer to start making one! You just have to roll it and then collect your pile of snow with a shovel, to finally pile them up! You can personalize your frosted friends with seeds, carrots and other accessories !** (install [JEI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) to see all the recipes)  I'm French and this mod was done with Mcreator. The mod adds snow shovels that allow you to remove snow in a 3x3 area : ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/579/image1.png)   Pile of Snow, Heap of Snow and Mound of Snow : ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/580/image2.png)   Here's how to make your own snowman :   Here are the different snowman part : ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/581/image3.png)   Here are the different combination possibilities : ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/582/image4.png)  [https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/583/image5.png](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/583/image5.png) You can wear the snowman hats yourself : ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/583/image5.png)    The fridge allows you to make ice and snow (with a right click) without going to a specific biome : ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/584/image6.png) With the mod, when you break ice, you collect ice cubes : ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/585/image7.png) You can make tools with packed ice cubes :![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/586/image8.png)   You can put this mod in your modpack.
